nasb.text: Immediately the man became well, and picked up his pallet and began to walk. Now it was the Sabbath on that day.

esv.text: And at once the man was healed, and he took up his bed and walked. Now that day was the Sabbath.

cnv.text: 那人立刻痊愈，就拿起褥子走了。 那天正是安息日。

ccb.text: 那人立刻痊愈了，拿起垫子开始行走。那天正好是安息日，

csbs.text: 那个人立刻痊愈了，就拿起他的垫子开始走路。 那天是安息日，
